title: decide-monitor-arm input
description: Run-state inputs to `claude_hpc.atoms.monitor_arm.decide_monitor_arm`. Drives the cron / loop / none arm decision + cadence + literal armed: line.

summary.description: last_status['summary'] from the run journal — {complete, running, pending, failed} integer counters. Missing keys default to 0.

invocation_argv.description: Exact /monitor-hpc <args> string the next tick should re-invoke. Stamped into cron_create_args.prompt.
